[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010111 5
1 10110001 4
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 11100010 4

01 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6
12 11100001 4
23 00010010 2
34 10101000 3
45 00010110 3
56 10000000 1

70 00010001 2

71 00010000 1
